subject: Outfit
body:
Please stop telling Michelle I bought an outfit for her. 
She asked if she can come pick it up ! What is she talking about..
I have one, which I bought before she was even around, for you and me and she is not taking it..

I told her that
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld
